reference: My son is twelve years old. He has had knee pain for about four months now. The pain is below the kneecap. I have taken him to the doctor five times for the pain. He has had no X-rays or tests. They just keep telling me it is a sports injury and that it will get better in time. He has started limping in the past week, with a knot and swelling below the kneecap. I am so frustrated right now. Could you please tell me what this could be other than a sports injury?
